description: Phase 6: Identity, Permissions, Workspaces, and Context Graph. Extend @quant/common with workspace/org/team/role/permission/resource/context-graph/memory types. Expand the identity service with RBAC. Add a new @quant/identity-permissions package implementing workspace-scoped RBAC, resource registry, context graph, user-controlled memory, and consent management. All must type-check and have tests.
steps: 1. In packages/common/src/types.ts, add new types: Workspace, Organization, Team, Role, Permission, AppGrant, AgentGrant, Resource, ContextItem, MemoryItem. Add PermissionScope entries for workspace and agent scopes (e.g., 'workspace:manage', 'agent:execute', 'memory:read', 'memory:write', 'context:read'). Follow existing BaseEntity pattern.

2. Create a new package packages/identity-permissions/ with package.json (name: @quant/identity-permissions, dependencies: @quant/common, zod; devDependencies: vitest, typescript, @types/node), tsconfig.json (extending root, references to common), vitest.config.ts.

3. In packages/identity-permissions/src/types.ts, define detailed types: WorkspaceRole (owner/admin/member/guest), ResourcePermission (create/read/update/delete/share/admin), ResourceType (message/email/doc/file/meeting/post/video/campaign/task/payment/code-artifact), AgentAccessGrant (which agent can access which resource types for which workspace), ContextNode (id, type, ownerId, workspaceId, metadata, relationships), MemoryEntry (id, userId, appSource, content, paused, createdAt), ConsentPrompt (resourceType, agentId, reason, userResponse).

4. In packages/identity-permissions/src/core/rbac.ts, implement RBACEngine class: addRole(workspaceId, userId, role), removeRole, getRoles, hasPermission(userId, workspaceId, resource, action). Use permission matrices mapping WorkspaceRole to allowed ResourcePermission sets. Include workspace isolation (user can only access resources within granted workspaces).

5. In packages/identity-permissions/src/core/resource-registry.ts, implement ResourceRegistry class: registerResource(resource), getResource(id), listResources(workspaceId, type, filters), getResourcesByOwner(ownerId), transferOwnership, setAIAccessToggle(resourceId, enabled). Each resource tracks its workspace, owner, permissions, and AI-access-enabled flag.

6. In packages/identity-permissions/src/core/context-graph.ts, implement ContextGraph class: addNode(ContextNode), addEdge(fromId, toId, relationship), getRelated(nodeId, depth), getByType(type, workspaceId), search(query, workspaceId). Support resource types: users, messages, emails, docs, files, meetings, posts, videos, campaigns, tasks, payments, code-artifacts. Enforce permission checks (user must have read access to workspace).

7. In packages/identity-permissions/src/core/memory-manager.ts, implement MemoryManager class: addMemory(userId, appSource, content), getMemories(userId, filters), editMemory(id, content), deleteMemory(id), pauseMemory(id), resumeMemory(id), setAppMemoryEnabled(userId, app, enabled), getAppMemorySettings(userId). Implement per-app memory controls and pause functionality.

8. In packages/identity-permissions/src/core/consent-manager.ts, implement ConsentManager class: requestConsent(userId, agentId, resourceType, reason), recordResponse(promptId, response), getActiveConsents(userId), revokeConsent(consentId), getDataUsageExplanation(suggestionId), getAIDataUsagePanel(userId). Support 'Why am I seeing this?' and 'What data did AI use?' features.

9. In packages/identity-permissions/src/core/workspace-audit.ts, implement WorkspaceAuditLog class: logEvent(workspaceId, actor, action, resource, metadata), getEvents(workspaceId, filters), exportEvents(workspaceId, format). Support data export and deletion request tracking.
10. Create packages/identity-permissions/src/index.ts barrel export for all classes and types.

11. Write comprehensive tests in packages/identity-permissions/src/__tests__/: rbac.test.ts (test role assignment, permission checks, workspace isolation), resource-registry.test.ts (register, query, AI toggle), context-graph.test.ts (add nodes/edges, traversal, permission filtering), memory-manager.test.ts (CRUD, pause, per-app controls), consent-manager.test.ts (request, record, revoke, explanation), workspace-audit.test.ts (log, query, export).
12. Register the new package in root tsconfig.json paths and references (add @quant/identity-permissions entry). Ensure pnpm install picks up the new workspace package.
13. Run pnpm typecheck, pnpm test, pnpm build, pnpm lint and fix any failures.
acceptance_criteria: packages/identity-permissions package exists with all core modules (rbac, resource-registry, context-graph, memory-manager, consent-manager, workspace-audit)
packages/common/src/types.ts includes Workspace, Organization, Team, Role, Permission, AppGrant, AgentGrant, Resource, ContextItem, MemoryItem types
All tests pass: pnpm test passes with the new test files included
pnpm typecheck passes across all 72+ packages (including the new one)
RBAC enforces workspace isolation (tests prove cross-workspace access is denied)
Memory manager supports view/edit/delete/pause/per-app controls (tests cover each)
Consent manager tracks AI data usage and supports explanation queries (tests cover)
Context graph supports all 12 resource types with relationship traversal
verification: pnpm typecheck (must pass all packages including new identity-permissions)
pnpm test (must pass all suites including new identity-permissions tests)
findings: All verification gates pass. Commit message max-line-length enforced by commitlint (100 chars header, 100 chars body lines). Prettier runs via lint-staged on commit. Build produces dist/ output (not committed). 78 new tests across 6 test files all pass.
